case_title: TACY NICHOLAS VS SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY TACY NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TACY NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,323.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $19.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $38.75 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS HEARING SET FOR OCT-09-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-09-1991, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TACY NICHOLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT KEVIN MOSS AKA SCOTT C MOSS
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FILED HEARING DATE NOVEMBER 15, 1991 9AM DEPT 5.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SANCTIONS & REQUEST FOR ORDER DECLARING PLFT A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FILED. HRG DATE SET FOR NOV. 15, 1991. 9:00 PM DEPT. 5.
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO TACY NICHOLAS RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
